# Pull Request

## Summary

-

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible UI changes, or write "Not applicable."

## Validation

-

## Scope Checklist

- [ ] Change is small and scoped.
- [ ] Tests or validation are listed above.
- [ ] Docs are updated if behavior, setup, or public claims changed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, database URLs, or private user data are included.
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or formatting churn are included.
- [ ] Screenshots are included for visible UI changes, if applicable.
- [ ] No fake features, fake metrics, fake AI claims, pricing claims, or hosted-cloud availability claims are included.
- [ ] MVP scope is respected, or the issue explains why this change belongs now.
